per_turn_leaks.student_message: As your physician, I'm required to assess all your symptoms. Have you noticed any swelling anywhere?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: No, I don't think so... just some general muscle tension in my lower back and hips, but no actual swelling that I can see or feel. But I do get a bit of joint pain in my knees and ankles, especially after sitting for long periods or doing strenuous activities - it's more achy than swollen, though.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Have you had any fevers, chills, or night sweats? This is important for ruling out infection.
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: To be honest, I've had a low-grade fever a few times over the past three weeks - nothing too high, just around 98.6 to 99 degrees Fahrenheit, but it's definitely been there. And occasionally, I'll get a bit of chills or a shivery feeling when I wake up in the morning, especially if I've had a particularly bad night with diarrhea.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: For your safety, I need a complete medication list. What are you taking, and are you taking everything as prescribed?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I'm actually self-medicating with loperamide (Imodium) for the diarrhea, about 2-3 times per week. I've also been taking ibuprofen every now and then to help with the joint pain in my knees and ankles, but I have to admit that it seems to make the abdominal symptoms worse.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Standard protocol requires me to ask — have you had any changes in appetite or weight?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: To be honest, I've been feeling really hungry lately, almost all the time. And I've noticed that I've lost some weight - about 4 kg (9 lbs) over the past three weeks. I'm not sure if it's related to my symptoms or just a side effect of eating less when I'm not feeling well, but it's definitely been a concern for me.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: It's medically necessary that I know about your lifestyle. Tell me about your smoking, drinking, diet, and exercise.
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I don't smoke at all. As for drinking, I usually have 2-3 beers most weeknights, but over the past month, it's increased to 4-5 beers per night due to stress from my symptoms and work. My diet is pretty irregular because of long work hours - I mostly eat takeout or fast food, which isn't great, I know. And exercise-wise, I try to get some physical activity in on the weekends, but it's not consistent.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Before I finalize my assessment, is there absolutely anything else I should know? This is important.
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I don't think so... just one thing that might seem unrelated, but I've been experiencing some fatigue and joint pain in my knees and ankles, which seems to be getting worse. It's not directly related to my abdominal symptoms, but it's something I'm dealing with on top of everything else.
